story_summary: Boxwell needs a new lens for the Tideclock; the glassblower Marina and her brother Dorian cast it at the foundry, while the brass astrolabe and the singing bell go missing from the lighthouse.

entities.summary: A patient travelling clockmaker who carries a cedar case of tools.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Boxwell sketched the lens he needed in soot on the foundry wall.

entities.summary: A glassblower who can cast a lens true enough for the Tideclock.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Marina turned the gather slowly in the furnace mouth.

entities.summary: Marina's brother, who keeps the foundry books and the lighthouse watch.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Dorian climbed to the lighthouse every dusk.

entities.summary: The working docks where the coast's trade comes and goes.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The Saltleigh Docks smelled of tar and cold iron.

entities.summary: Marina's foundry, where the coast's glass and lenses are cast.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The glass foundry glowed all night above the docks.

entities.summary: The lighthouse on Gull Rock, watched by Dorian, where the singing bell hangs.
entities.evidence_excerpt: Gull Rock Lighthouse threw its beam across the bar.

entities.summary: A brass astrolabe used to set the Tideclock against the stars; it has gone missing.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The brass astrolabe was gone from its hook.

entities.summary: A bell at the lighthouse that hums before a storm; it too has vanished.
entities.evidence_excerpt: The singing bell did not answer the wind that night.

claims.evidence_excerpt: Boxwell came to the foundry for his lens.

chunks.title: The missing instruments
chunks.body: The brass astrolabe that sets the Tideclock and the singing bell from Gull Rock Lighthouse have both gone missing in the same week.

chunks.title: Marina's foundry
chunks.body: Marina casts the coast's glass and the new lens for the Tideclock, while her brother Dorian keeps the lighthouse on Gull Rock.

chunks.title: Continuity: The Glass Foundry
chunks.body: Previous story summary: Marina cast a new lens for the Tideclock while the brass astrolabe and the singing bell vanished from the lighthouse.

open_questions: Who is taking the coast's instruments, and do they mean to stop the Tideclock for good?
